overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban plaza at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic architecture. The character approaches a Pawnshop Hotel entrance and enters an elevator. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with cyan and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered neon-lit plaza toward the distant hotel entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera toward the food stall area

entered.detail: chain-link security fence with metal posts marking the plaza boundary
illuminated cyan and pink hotel signage mounted on the building facade
small kiosk with yellow illuminated interior and service window
tall vertical light strips emitting magenta pink light
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered cyberpunk plaza at night, with wet reflective pavement and vibrant neon signage. The camera moves forward past a metal fence gate on the left, heading toward a yellow food stall and vertical pink neon lights in the distance. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the center of the frame.

events.description: exits the covered arcade into the open plaza in front of the Pawnshop Hotel
slows slightly while approaching the building entrance doors

agents.ego_description: approaching the Pawnshop Hotel entrance across the yellow marked plaza, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the concrete stairs looking at the building entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'PAWN SHOP HOTEL' with downward arrow above the entrance
bright yellow painted geometric patterns on the ground leading to the entrance
wide staircase with metal railings leading to an upper level
automatic sliding glass doors with metal mesh frames at the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza with distinctive yellow ground markings leading to the Pawnshop Hotel entrance. The camera moves forward past vertical pink neon lights now on the left, approaching the glass entrance doors. A pedestrian stands near the concrete stairs on the right, while the large illuminated hotel sign dominates the center of the view.

events.description: enters the Pawnshop Hotel building through the automatic glass doors
enters the elevator and the doors close

agents.ego_description: entering the hotel lobby and accessing the elevator to descend to the lower level

entered.detail: small enclosed elevator cabin with metal walls and overhead lighting
wall-mounted digital displays showing advertisements and brand logos
illuminated touch panel displaying '05 LOWER LEVEL' and floor selection interface
digital billboards displaying 'WET DREAM' advertisement in pink text

segments.scene_description: The character enters the building lobby and immediately approaches the elevator. After entering the elevator cabin, the doors close and the camera focuses on the digital advertisement screens on the walls displaying 'WET DREAM' and 'EL GUAPO' brands, along with the illuminated control panel showing the destination as '05 LOWER LEVEL'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, rain-slicked cyberpunk plaza into the enclosed, sterile interior of a hotel elevator. It begins by gliding through a semi-covered outdoor area, passing a metal fence and a yellow food stall under the glow of distant pink neon lights. As the camera advances, the space opens into a wide plaza with yellow ground markings that lead directly toward the illuminated entrance of the Pawnshop Hotel. The scene then shifts from the open night air into the building's lobby, moving seamlessly through the glass doors and into the confined space of an elevator cabin. Finally, the doors slide shut, transitioning the view to a close-up of digital advertisements for Wet Dream and El Guapo alongside a control panel indicating a descent to the lower level.
